testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Currency Symbols should have USD symbol
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Currency Symbols should have USD symbol

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Currency Symbols should have EUR symbol
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Currency Symbols should have EUR symbol

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Currency Symbols should have HUF symbol
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Currency Symbols should have HUF symbol

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Currency Names should have USD name
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Currency Names should have USD name

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Currency Names should have EUR name
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Currency Names should have EUR name

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Currency Names should have HUF name
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Currency Names should have HUF name

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - HUF should format HUF with no decimal places
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - HUF should format HUF with no decimal places

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - HUF should format HUF with thousands separator
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - HUF should format HUF with thousands separator

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - HUF should round HUF amount
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - HUF should round HUF amount

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - HUF should handle zero HUF
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - HUF should handle zero HUF

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - HUF should handle negative HUF
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - HUF should handle negative HUF

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - HUF should use HUF by default
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - HUF should use HUF by default

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - USD should format USD with 2 decimal places
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - USD should format USD with 2 decimal places

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - USD should format USD with thousands separator
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - USD should format USD with thousands separator

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - USD should handle decimal cents in USD
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - USD should handle decimal cents in USD

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - USD should handle zero USD
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - USD should handle zero USD

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - EUR should format EUR with 2 decimal places
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - EUR should format EUR with 2 decimal places

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - EUR should format EUR correctly
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Format Currency - EUR should format EUR correctly

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Get Currency Symbol should get USD symbol
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Get Currency Symbol should get USD symbol

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Get Currency Symbol should get EUR symbol
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Get Currency Symbol should get EUR symbol

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Get Currency Symbol should get HUF symbol
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Get Currency Symbol should get HUF symbol

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Get Currency Symbol should use HUF by default
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Get Currency Symbol should use HUF by default

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Get Currency Symbol should return currency code for unknown currency
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Get Currency Symbol should return currency code for unknown currency

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Get Currency Symbol should return currency code for empty string
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Get Currency Symbol should return currency code for empty string

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Edge Cases should handle very large amounts
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Edge Cases should handle very large amounts

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Edge Cases should handle very small amounts
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Edge Cases should handle very small amounts

testcase.classname: Currency Utilities Tests Edge Cases should handle negative amounts
testcase.name: Currency Utilities Tests Edge Cases should handle negative amounts

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests Password Hashing should hash a password correctly
testcase.name: Authentication Tests Password Hashing should hash a password correctly

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests Password Hashing should produce different hashes for the same password
testcase.name: Authentication Tests Password Hashing should produce different hashes for the same password

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests Password Verification should verify correct password
testcase.name: Authentication Tests Password Verification should verify correct password

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests Password Verification should reject incorrect password
testcase.name: Authentication Tests Password Verification should reject incorrect password

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests Password Verification should handle empty password
testcase.name: Authentication Tests Password Verification should handle empty password

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests JWT Token Generation should generate a valid token
testcase.name: Authentication Tests JWT Token Generation should generate a valid token

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests JWT Token Generation should include userId, email and role in token payload
testcase.name: Authentication Tests JWT Token Generation should include userId, email and role in token payload

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests JWT Token Verification should verify valid token
testcase.name: Authentication Tests JWT Token Verification should verify valid token

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests JWT Token Verification should return null for invalid token
testcase.name: Authentication Tests JWT Token Verification should return null for invalid token

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests JWT Token Verification should return null for empty token
testcase.name: Authentication Tests JWT Token Verification should return null for empty token

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests Token Decoding should decode a valid token
testcase.name: Authentication Tests Token Decoding should decode a valid token

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests Token Decoding should return null for invalid token
testcase.name: Authentication Tests Token Decoding should return null for invalid token

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests Verification Token Generation should generate a verification token
testcase.name: Authentication Tests Verification Token Generation should generate a verification token

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests Verification Token Generation should generate different tokens each time
testcase.name: Authentication Tests Verification Token Generation should generate different tokens each time

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests Verification Token Generation should generate hex string token
testcase.name: Authentication Tests Verification Token Generation should generate hex string token

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests Extract Token From Request should extract token from Bearer Authorization header
testcase.name: Authentication Tests Extract Token From Request should extract token from Bearer Authorization header

testcase.classname: Authentication Tests Extract Token From Request should return null if no token present
testcase.name: Authentication Tests Extract Token From Request should return null if no token present
